parallel_batches.validation: focused foundational tests plus node --check on new modules
npm run check and focused foundational tests
npm run check, npm test, quickstart smoke

guardrail_index: Extend existing CLI/runtime/adapter modules and add src/control-plane only for global orchestration.
Do not add daemon/service/GUI/TUI/MCP in this feature.
Stop/restart/force-stop require verified Launchdeck ownership; port/PID alone is insufficient.
State files are versioned; newer versions fail closed for dangerous mutations.
Clean is hygiene only and never reset/delete roots/kill processes.
JSON envelope, error codes, next actions, JSONL streams are compatibility surfaces.
Events/output/log metadata must avoid secret leakage.
Demo and tests use checked-in fixture scripts, not inline node -e long-running processes.
Cross-platform-ready claims require Windows/macOS/Linux lifecycle smoke evidence.
ca_mapping: Unsupported registry mutation or missing atomic write routes back to /sp.plan
If projectId/alias identity cannot be made stable
If removal must delete files or force-remove running tasks
If starting state cannot be recorded before concurrent spawn risk
If external conflict requires kill behavior
If stop cannot preserve stop_failed evidence
If force-stop needs to target unverified owners
If restart cannot be serialized safely
If readiness collapses into PID alive only
If stale lock takeover cannot be proven safely
If newer state must be mutated blindly
If command requires prompt in automation mode
If platform evidence cannot support safe stop
If legacy compatibility cannot be maintained
If release lacks demo or smoke evidence
